'''ngadhungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:izba|izba]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:izba|izba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngadhungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædhingith|ngædhingith]] || [[word:ngædhingij|ngædhingij]] || [[word:ngædhingish|ngædhingish]] || [[word:ngædhingi|ngædhingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhudhunguth|ngadhudhunguth]] || [[word:ngadhudhunguj|ngadhudhunguj]] || [[word:ngadhudhungush|ngadhudhungush]] || [[word:ngadhudhungu|ngadhudhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhunguth|ngadhunguth]] || [[word:ngadhunguj|ngadhunguj]] || [[word:ngadhungush|ngadhungush]] || [[word:ngadhungu|ngadhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhufnguth|ngadhufnguth]] || [[word:ngadhufnguj|ngadhufnguj]] || [[word:ngadhufngush|ngadhufngush]] || [[word:ngadhufnguf|ngadhufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngadhunguthu|ngadhunguthu]] || [[word:ngadhunguju|ngadhunguju]] || [[word:ngadhungushu|ngadhungushu]] || [[word:ngadhunguku|ngadhunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngadhunguth|ngadhunguth]] || [[word:ngadhunguj|ngadhunguj]] || [[word:ngadhungush|ngadhungush]] || [[word:ngadhungu|ngadhungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngadhunguthul|ngadhunguthul]] || [[word:ngadhungujul|ngadhungujul]] || [[word:ngadhungushul|ngadhungushul]] || [[word:ngadhungukul|ngadhungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngadhunguthuthu|ngadhunguthuthu]] || [[word:ngadhungujuju|ngadhungujuju]] || [[word:ngadhungushushu|ngadhungushushu]] || [[word:ngadhunguku|ngadhunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngadhunguthun|ngadhunguthun]] || [[word:ngadhungujun|ngadhungujun]] || [[word:ngadhungushun|ngadhungushun]] || [[word:ngadhungukun|ngadhungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngadhunguthuoro|ngadhunguthuoro]] || [[word:ngadhungujuoro|ngadhungujuoro]] || [[word:ngadhungushuoro|ngadhungushuoro]] || [[word:ngadhungukuoro|ngadhungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
